string.text: Task received. Check your PDA for details.
Unable to process task request at this time.
Your reputation in the Zone has improved.
Your reputation in the Zone has suffered.
Stash coordinates received. Check your map.
WARNING: Hostile contacts detected in your area.
ALERT: Hostile forces approaching your position.
Friendly contacts inbound to your area.
Friendly units have arrived in your sector.
Reinforcements have linked up with your position.
DANGER: Mutant contact confirmed in your vicinity.
A courier is en route to your location.
You need to have your PDA open to make a choice.
$name has joined your squad as a companion.
Relations deteriorated — NPC is now hostile.
Relations improved — NPC is now friendly.
$player_name, you in Cordon? Need help. Been watching a group of bandits hanging around %cordon_panda_st%. I can keep eyes on them, but I can't clear it alone.
Marked it on your PDA. I'll move in when you get close. Don't leave me there by myself.
Bad enough that I'm messaging strangers instead of pretending I'm brave. Few of them. Fast ones. You still want in, I'll mark %cordon_panda_st%.
Right. Figured I'd ask before getting torn up. Forget it.
Forget it. Either they move on or they eat me first.
Done. Head for %cordon_panda_st%. I'll close in once you reach the area.
Fair enough. I'll stay away from the place.
You're a lifesaver. Seriously. Thought I was done for when they started moving. Here — take this. Earned every ruble.
Yeah yeah. Sending you what I've got. Don't spend it all on vodka.
Good stalker. I'll remember this. Stay safe out there, $player_name.
Figures. At least you tried. More than most would do. I'll find another way to deal with it.
Always does in the Zone. Whatever. I'll figure something out. Or I won't. Either way.

$player_name. Found a dead merc out here. PDA was cracked, but I managed to extract one set of stash coordinates before it sparked out. I need to pay for repairs, so I'm selling the spot for 3000 RU. You want first dibs?
4000 RU? Sounds fair. Transferring the funds.
Got the transfer. Forwarding the encrypted attachment now. Hope it's got something good inside.
How do I know it's actually a merc stash?
Guy was wearing a blue eagle patch and carrying western gear. Definitely a merc. You buying or not?
4000 is steep for a blind box. I'll give you 3000 RU.
Damn it, my suit is shredded and I really need the cash... Fine. 3000 RU. Send it over.
Not paying for a mystery box. Pass.
Suit yourself. I'll ask the boys at %garbage_panda_st% instead.
Guess you're busy. I'm selling it to someone else.
Alright, I'll take the gamble. Sending 4000 RU.
Good doing business with you. Coordinates attached. Stay safe, $player_name.
Still a gamble. 3000 RU and we have a deal.
You're killing me here. Fine... 3000. Send it before I change my mind.
Transfer confirmed. Stash location added to your map. Don't tell the others I let it go this cheap.
Actually, I changed my mind. Keep it.
Are you serious? You haggled just to waste my time? Piss off.
Military is shaking me down at a checkpoint. Need 5000 RU flat to pass, and I'm short. Spot me the cash, I'll owe you one.
Got it. I won't forget this. Uploading a dead drop I found earlier to cover the debt.
Sounds like your problem, not mine.
Thanks for nothing. I'll remember this.
You've never been down bad? Just thought a fellow loner would help me out. Thanks anyway.
